title: GetTypologyCommand
description: GetTypologyCommand: Command that when executed with the LadybugTools Adapter, returns a list of Typology objects from the Python predefined Typologies list.

Filter.description: Text to filter the resultant list by. Filter applies to the Typology Name. Leave blank to return all Typologies.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
